name: jsm-asset-mcp
description: Jira Service Management Assets MCP Server

settings.name: Jira Email
settings.description: The email address associated with your Atlassian account

settings.name: Jira Workspace ID
settings.description: (Optional) Your Jira Assets Workspace ID. Can be left empty.

settings.name: Jira Cloud ID
settings.description: (Optional) Your Jira Cloud ID. Can be left empty when Jira Domain is set.

settings.name: LLM Provider
settings.description: LLM provider: 'anthropic' (default, direct API), 'anthropic-vertex' (Google Vertex AI), 'anthropic-bedrock' (Amazon Bedrock), or 'gemini' (Google AI Studio)

settings.name: Anthropic API Key
settings.description: (Required for provider=anthropic) Your Anthropic API key

settings.name: Vertex Project ID
settings.description: (Required for provider=anthropic-vertex) Your GCP project ID

settings.name: Vertex Region
settings.description: (Optional for provider=anthropic-vertex) GCP region, defaults to global

settings.name: AWS Region
settings.description: (Optional for provider=anthropic-bedrock) AWS region, defaults to us-east-1

settings.name: Gemini API Key
settings.description: (Required for provider=gemini) Your Google AI Studio API key (https://aistudio.google.com/apikey)
